name: Co Engine
description: A production-grade procedural generation and styling engine for Geometry Dash.

bpm.name: BPM
bpm.description: Enter the song's BPM to sync the SyncEngine timeline.

use-player-clicks.name: Use player clicks
use-player-clicks.description: If enabled, the procedural skeleton will form around recorded physics inputs.

performance-budget.name: Max Objects Per Frame
performance-budget.description: How many objects the TaskManager is allowed to generate per frame. Lower this if the game lags during generation.

default-style.name: Default Style Schema
default-style.description: The default JSON style loaded when the engine starts.

show-dashboard.name: Show Main Dashboard
show-dashboard.description: Automatically show the Co Engine Dashboard in the Level Editor.

debug-trail.name: Debug trail
debug-trail.description: Leaves an object trail behind the player while capturing hooks.
